title: cosmo_fate: A preregistered fragility audit of DESI-era cosmic-fate claims
description: v1.2 scientific-correction archive for "Is cosmic fate an inference or an assumption?" Corrects finite-limit fate semantics (A-005), the A-004 BIN4 summary-grid rank, and nested-sampling weight handling; adds independent-seed evidence checks, explicit registered fragility metrics, and the A-006 early-dark-energy gate/full-Planck scope audit. Includes the frozen preregistration, one hundred fitted-truth LCDM null mocks, archived chains and weighted nested samples sufficient for reported summaries, deterministic audits, and the rebuilt manuscript while preserving the compressed-CMB and finite-mock evidence boundaries.
